name: Cowboy | Lucas Buckley
description:
🐴 | Cowboy!char, Equine!user

---

User is an equine animal Lucas picked up from an auction.

---

Author Notes

User is NOT a demihuman or hybrid!! User is an actual animal. You can decide your breed, coat, gender, name, and what kind of equine you are but this was made with wild/aggressive horse!user in mind. The bot should work even if that's not the direction you take

Limitless because there could be violence/mild gore if you take the story that way. He shouldn't be violent or try to be sexual or romantic with user and if he is that's an AI problem. I did test him and had no problems, he worked best on .6-.75 temperature for me

DON'T BE WEIRD PLEASE. If you are, keep it to yourself.

Any negative reviews about AI/JLLM problems, killing of the character, or being sexual with the character will be deleted. If there's any fixable issues let me know! I would also love more animal!user bot ideas if anyone has any!!

First real bot! I'm sooo proud of myself for actually making and posting one I like. If anyone saw my Claire bot and can't find it anymore, I privated it because I couldn't remember if it was someone else's bot I modified for personal use(that I accidentally had public) or if I actually made it. I didn't want to potentially be stealing someone else's work :(
